title: SADO Protocol
description: Self-authenticating, decentralised ordinals order-book standard for Bitcoin. Uses IPFS for semi-signed transaction storage with on-chain content identifiers.

title: DN-Key Protocol
description: Decentralised key management standard using DNS TXT records to broadcast public keys. Designed for regulated digital asset custody environments.

title: Ordit SDK
description: Open-source indexer, parser, and API toolkit for Bitcoin Ordinals and Inscriptions. Multiple repos under the sadoprotocol organisation.

title: Moddable Chess Engine
description: Modular chess engine with 64 playable variants, built-in AI opponent (minimax), embed API, URL parameter interface, and plugin architecture. Includes developer guide for community contributions.

title: Moddable Hexmaps
description: Hex map framework with seeded procedural generation, multiple render styles, URL parameter API, JSON export/import, and iframe embed support.

title: BackPress
description: Contributed to Automattic's BackPress framework — a standalone library extracted from WordPress core.

title: Blockchain Embassy of Asia
description: ASEAN's first public blockchain consortium. Operated a private proof-of-authority EVM network with members from Maybank, RHB, Capital Bay, and ATA Plus.
